subject: [PATCH v3 03/20] iomap: skip the finishing iomap_iter() on the simple DIO read fast path

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch optimizes the direct I/O read path by skipping an unnecessary iomap_iter() call when reading from filesystems that don't require ->iomap_end() work. It introduces a new flag, IOMAP_DIO_NO_IOMAP_END, which allows filesystems to promise there is no ->iomap_end() work and no folio batch, allowing the finishing iomap_iter() to be skipped. The patch applies this optimization to ext4, xfs, exfat, and ntfs direct read paths.
